description:
'''Psydub''' (not to be confused with [[dub music|dub]]) is a fusion genre of [[electronic music]] that has roots in [[psychedelic trance]], [[Ambient music|ambient]] and [[dub music]].
Incorporated [[Dub music|dub]] elements are melodic basslines, deep [[reggae]] roots and producing techniques like dynamically adding extensive [[echo]], [[reverb]], panoramic [[delay (audio effect)|delay]], and occasional [[Dubbing (music)|dubbing]] of vocal or instrumental snippets from the original version or other works.
An incorporated [[Ambient music|ambient]] element is an emphasis on tone and atmosphere.

Incorporated [[Psychedelic trance|psytrance]] and [[Goa trance]] elements are low-bass [[frequencies]] and hypnotic [[melodies]] and the use of vocal [[sampling (music)|samples]], often from [[Science fiction film|science fiction movies]]. Those samples mostly contain references to [[psychedelic drug]]s, [[Cannabis culture|cannabis]], [[parapsychology]], [[extraterrestrial life]], [[existentialism]], [[out of body experience]]s, [[dreams]], [[physics]], [[molecular biology]], [[electronics]], [[time travel]] and [[spirituality]].

Psydub is also highly influenced by the [[music of India]].
